chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 423 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.515/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.516/2026 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.517/2026 (R/Surety) 30.01.2026 None present for the applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contents of the application, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Anwar was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 21.05.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.40,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing an original special savings certificate amounting to Rs.50,000/-. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 26.09.2025. Subsequently, the accused has been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the order dated 11.12.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
